title: Update key types in README with app keys description
author: morriszdweck

gist.headline: Key Information
gist.blurb: Updated our README to clearly explain app keys. Because the only thing better than a key is knowing exactly which door it opens!
gist.summary: Updated the README to include a clear description of app keys alongside the existing key types.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily understand the different types of API keys available, specifically app keys, directly from the main documentation.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee reading a giant pixelated manual or map, holding a glowing golden key. The Nomnom creature eating old, outdated documentation pages.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a glowing golden key over an open pixelated manual. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats old crumpled paper nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a glowing golden key over an open pixelated manual. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats old crumpled paper nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
